description: This email template is designed to engage and inspire action within the non-profit sector, particularly those involved in activism. It is ideally suited for organizations striving to combat hate and foster unity and understanding. The template features a layout that is perfect for sharing news updates, magazine-style articles, and information about your program. It encourages readers to join the cause and participate in the movement to eradicate hate. Its design is straightforward yet compelling, ensuring your message is both seen and felt. This template is a powerful tactic for fostering engagement and promoting positive change.
short_description: Promote unity and compassion with our engaging email template designed for activism, non-profit organizations, and news programs. Ideal for combating hate, promoting respect, and launching advocacy campaigns. Inspire action, foster positive change, and mobilize your audience for a more inclusive world.

designer.description:
I am a creative multidisciplinary person, with a broad vision in the world of design and communication. 
All of this, thanks to extensive experience in different fields: web design, online design, corporate identity, creation of web structures and functionalities, illustration, audiovisuals, apps, and even digital art.
